PARTNER ECOSYSTEM

Scale faster with our technology partner programs.

Whether you're a SaaS reseller, a systems integrator, or a technology consultant — partnering with Trai gives you access to battle-tested platforms, co-engineering support, and joint go-to-market strategies. Let's build together.

Referral Partner Program

Refer clients who need custom software, cloud migrations, or AI solutions. Earn competitive commissions on every closed deal with zero overhead.

  • Revenue share on every referred project.
  • Dedicated partner portal with deal tracking.
  • Co-branded case studies and collateral.

Reseller Partner Program

White-label and resell our enterprise platforms — CRM, ERP, and HRMS — under your own brand with full technical support from our engineering team.

  • Attractive reseller margins.
  • Full API access and white-labeling.
  • Priority engineering support and SLAs.

Technology Partner Program

Integrate your product with our platform ecosystem. Build joint solutions for shared enterprise clients and go to market together.

  • Joint solution architecture and development.
  • Certification and integration training.
  • Co-marketing campaigns and events.
